meta.title: Intellectual Property & Antitrust Laws: The Way Ahead
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Urška Petrovčič for a conversation with U.S. Federal Trade Commissioner Christine Wilson and antitrust law expert and former Acting Chair of the U.S. Federal Trade Commission Maureen Ohlhausen on the interplay between antitrust laws and intellectual property. In the last decade, courts and antitrust agencies have issued important clarifications pertaining to the limits that antitrust laws pose on the exercise of patent rights. These developments have provided the much-needed clarity for market players but are now called into question. What does this portend for antitrust enforcement in the future? Join Hudson Institute for a discussion on this important topic.
